claim: PCF-1 v1.3 (record #2, math.NT submission) cites Apery 1979, Schneider 1934, Chudnovsky 1980, Wolfart-Wuestholz 1988, Bertrand 2002, Iwasaki-Kimura-Shimomura-Yoshida, Jimbo 1982, Boutroux 1913, Ecalle resurgence, Berry-Howls hyperasymptotics, Stieltjes 1894, Lang elliptic, Silverman advanced; modern arXiv-active custodians of these lines are Zudilin (transcendence/irrationality) and Garoufalidis (Ecalle resurgence in number theory)

CT v1.3 (record #4, math.CA submission) annotated bibliography contains 4 first-order endorser-candidate authors with explicit entries: Costin (Asymptotics/Series/Resurgence book + Costin-Costin paper), Sauzin (resurgence + Mitschi-Sauzin volume), Mazzocco (Painleve monodromy + decorated character varieties; 2 entries), Garoufalidis-Costin (Resurgence of Kontsevich-Zagier power series); secondary entries Apery, Zudilin, Nesterenko anchor the irrationality-measure line

Wadim Zudilin has a publicly resolvable arXiv author identifier zudilin_w_1 with ORCID 0000-0001-9551-2903; latest math.NT submission as of 2026-05-04 is arXiv:2603.25506 (Furnsinn-Radchenko-Zudilin, integrality phenomenon, March 2026); affiliation Radboud University Nijmegen; primary research is number theory + transcendence + continued fractions; satisfies arXiv math.NT endorser eligibility (dozens of math.NT papers in last 24 months)

Marta Mazzocco has a publicly resolvable arXiv author identifier mazzocco_m_1 with ORCID 0000-0001-9917-2547; latest paper as of 2026-05-04 is arXiv:2407.17366 (Koornwinder-Mazzocco, DAHA C-check-1 C-1, July 2024, math.CA primary, Indag. Math. 2025); secondary recent arXiv:2405.10541 (Joshi-Mazzocco-Roffelsen, Segre surfaces and Painleve, math-ph); affiliation University of Birmingham; primary research is Painleve equations + isomonodromic deformations + DAHA + q-Askey; satisfies arXiv math.CA endorser eligibility

Stavros Garoufalidis has a publicly resolvable arXiv author identifier garoufalidis_s_1 with ORCID 0000-0001-5381-1593; representative recent math.NT paper is arXiv:2412.04241 (Garoufalidis-Scholze-Wheeler-Zagier, Habiro ring of a number field, Dec 2024, math.NT primary); also arXiv:1712.04887 (Calegari-Garoufalidis-Zagier, Bloch groups algebraic K-theory units Nahm conjecture, math.NT primary); affiliation SUSTech Shenzhen + MPIM Bonn; primary research is quantum topology with strong math.NT cross-list activity; satisfies arXiv math.NT and math.CA endorser eligibility

Three further bibliographic-overlap candidates (Costin O, Sauzin D, Beukers F) return HTTP 404 at the canonical arXiv author-id slug arxiv.org/a/<lastname>_<firstinitial>_1.html; conclusion is that these authors have NOT claimed an arXiv author identifier under the standard slug; their handles are therefore <HANDLE_NOT_PUBLIC> per the relay prompt Phase E ladder

Five populated endorsement-request templates produced this session: record2_PCF1_zudilin (math.NT primary), record2_PCF1_garoufalidis (math.NT fallback), record4_CT_mazzocco (math.CA primary), record4_CT_zudilin (math.CA cross-NT), record4_CT_garoufalidis (math.CA fallback); each template includes candidate full name + arXiv handle + ORCID + affiliation + 2-3 representative recent papers (with arXiv ids) + bibliographic-citation alignment with PCF-1 v1.3 / CT v1.3 + neutral descriptive language (no promotional verbs); no email addresses transcribed (operator-side confirmation step)

Verdict UPGRADE_G14_ENDORSERS_IDENTIFIED_3_HANDLES_CONFIRMED_EMAILS_PENDING_OPERATOR; 3 Tier-1 candidates with publicly confirmed arXiv handles + ORCIDs + recent math.NT or math.CA activity + research-area overlap with PCF-1/CT bibliographies; 3 Tier-2 candidates with research-area match but handles HANDLE_NOT_PUBLIC at standard slug; emails NOT transcribed per privacy hygiene (operator confirms at institutional pages); G14 closes pending operator-side outreach
